content:
Can someone help me improve hanta virus team
Goal is to have them enemies die of bleed and sac and jenkins has to stay for the hanta virus rat
Ok so the team sucks and Im abandoning it
bro is abandoning it as if he needs to pay child support
Make poison
guava i see you
where did ali go
Thats a seperate team then
are they sleeping under the bench
https://klipy.com/gifs/kamen-rider-kamen-rider-blade-9
Bubonic plaque or something
Yeah they were too loud
oh nah
arigato gamsamnida
What the genuie fuck
1 hp
Some guy just hit pickman with all Leigh exalt hits
Wtf

He got... Picked
Badumptsss
I FUCKING LOST AFTER THAT
I WOULDVE WON TO OF THEY DIDNT PULL THAT SHIT OUR OF THEIR ASS
if it's that close it could've gone either way and definitely not just your way 😛
Pickman would've killed the whole team next turn
It wasnt close
Now we can properly enjoy traphase and say "Random Hit BTW"
We'll love when thid happens
"Random" hits always hitting the same unit
How do you go through this every day
I just rarely play nowadays
How much elo i need to get to top reward in draft traphase
draft traphase was too long and pain to play
i need a goal somehow
Around 3k or 4k for a safety net
Oh god
Look like draft traphase is way harder than normal
should be 3.5k
draft is best mode
I should try draft
All pick sucks
should be renamed all daffodil <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

1 card could've ruined me but NOT TODAY
my bad
this mf
ate my door
thx to the advice my trio is finally winning yay Doll OP <:24_meow:1468259476107821137>
So, aigis better right?
Hmmm
Or it was the castor thingy?
I changed Celeste to Doll and it just worked <:Saya_wow:1513124172895879198>
changed some of the cards too, now ppl hv to either choose Doll (healer + revive) or Jenkin (DPS) to attack
is Helleios a common name? I fight this guy every 3 business days
HAHAHAHA
no
probably same guy
Impressive. He is quite persistent.<:Aurita_pinch:1468258028271833119>
I think you'll have a better time playing against some comp if you have stagnation on strike instead of poison
true, even if Im lucky the whole grp poison thing only works like twice
Btw if you want to be hyper cancerous
Then don't use uvhash posse
You need to sacrifice a lot of arithmetica + make it late game to have a decent amount of bleed
Also you need to focus kill on their support that can cleanse otherwise this posse is useless
I usually use Aigis + that card
to kill the support
And sometimes killing DPS first is more worth than the supp
Yeah but sometimes RNG can mess you up
Stuff like they kill your jenkin really fast
And you're left just trying to survive
While they can snipe the rest of your units one by one
Before you can even use bleed posse properly
hmm I see <:Brown_think:1459080117308620996>
Btw kath ramona can snipe your 24 turn 2
From full hp to 0
Turn 3 or 4 is probably jenkin turn to get sniped
I just assumed traphase is paper-scissor-rock and kinda gave up on those
I see its not now
Current meta is RNG into who is the luckiest to setup their one shot as fast as possible
Between kath ramona or daff ramona
yeah thsoe one-shot team I hv no idea how to handle them
That's why you go for more stall
Stuff like 3 stagnation pierce add another layer of stalling
You 3 stagnation on ramona
So she can't  regen 3 arith properly
And they can't 10 arith
ahh thats smart
There is also a reason why you go deep sea call wheel + stagnation on strike wheel
Since kath team most likely will put tank front
If they ever taunt, you strike 2 time with deep sea call
Or 1
Depending on ramona's position that will generally be behind the tank ( 2nd position) or 3rd position
Then you stagnation on strike
Right into ramona
how abt this tho
Since they have used their taunt, then next turn you can use the posse to 3 stagnation pierce
I dint even know what happened yesterday, my whole team just suddenly died
You use castor to regen barrier for jenkin, try to put pressure on helot with para so she can't alienus regen through strike
Helot gaming
It's also the reason why i said before not to use 24
If you want jenkin team
You can use pandia
She steal alienus
So helot can't exalt
And you use sakura wheel in this situation
So when jenkin exalt, she'll have 3 temporary amplification buffs
Which is 30% more dmg
If you have other wheel then it can be good too
Stuff like the para R wheel
4 cost with snake image
Pandia can exalt a lot
You buff jenkin with pandia's exalt, then doll dispel jenkin's void then you spam skills so jenkin can exalt with whisper wheel
hmm I will try her then
Depending of the wheel you use you'll have different playstyle
For sakura it might be better to select 3 random hit skill from the 3 cost
In para wheel for pandia
You select para
Because now in this turn of para, every para will be x2 dmg
Depending on who you're facing you either use barrier cards from castor or discard them through jenkin's exalt
That's how you works around with that team
thx for the advice, gotta spend some time getting used to pandia
Don't use those 2 posse btw
They are garbage
Revive posse is absolutely dogshit now
And uvhash posse like i said previously need to be late game
really!?
The wheel below aigis is arguable
for ubhash one I just forgor to change
Yeah, the value is absolutely dogshit
You revive but it stun your ally
Even if the ally revive again if he gets killed
If the opponent play units like lotan that have cards scaling based of killing
Then you just feed her more into having a huge dmg scaling card
ahh dint think abt that
The main downside are against lotan with scaling 2 cost, vortice with alienus regen on kill, daff alienus regen on kill too
Goliath with his kill = 60 alienus regen
Miryam with her 2 cost kill = 15 bleed on every opponent
And that's just the one i remember at the moments
There might be more i have forgotten
Also wheels that scale based of killing too
Overall it's just a trash posse now
After the stun implementation
It might have been better with revive but reduce any healing / dmg / shield generated by the revived unit by 50% for 1 turn
so those are what my opponents thinking when Im just spamming jenkin <:24_clown:1468259444423921871>
and using aigis as a zombie bait
Low elo generally don't know how to play
So you won't probably see a lot of strat
That's why your team works at the moment
Later in high elo
People know how to play better
So you'll see how problematic those 2 posse are
And same for the wheel below aigis
Current meta is who one shot the fastest
So uvhash posse is shit if you can't late game properly
Revive posse is shit due to stun
The wheel below aigis can be good in certain circumstances but not for that team
guess I will see how far I can go with my current team first then
thx for the advice its super helpful
You can make a lot of team tbh
Since you have the BP thingy
Yuh
Currently only daff and kath teams are meta tho
Damn, that's kind've annoying
Aight bet
Send the password battle
As you can see
It's how you play daff team
